$comment: Curated Go language feature transformations by version. Used by opencode-update --modernize

features.name: errors.AsType
features.description: Generic errors.AsType[T](err) replaces manual errors.As with cleaner syntax

features.name: new(expr)
features.description: new() can now take an expression, useful for optional pointer fields

features.name: reflect.Type.Fields()
features.description: Type.Fields() returns an iterator over struct fields

pattern.before: for i := 0; i < t\.NumField\(\); i\+\+ \{\n\s*f := t\.Field\(i\)

example.before:
for i := 0; i < t.NumField(); i++ {
    f := t.Field(i)

features.name: reflect.Type.Methods()
features.description: Type.Methods() returns an iterator over methods

pattern.before: for i := 0; i < t\.NumMethod\(\); i\+\+ \{\n\s*m := t\.Method\(i\)

example.before:
for i := 0; i < t.NumMethod(); i++ {
    m := t.Method(i)

features.name: bytes.Buffer.Peek
features.description: Peek at buffer contents without consuming

features.name: slog.NewMultiHandler
features.description: Create a handler that fans out to multiple handlers

features.name: testing.T.ArtifactDir
features.description: Directory for test artifacts, cleaned up after test

features.name: generic type aliases
features.description: Type aliases can now have type parameters
features.note: Manual review - depends on use case

features.name: range over int
features.description: for i := range 10 {} instead of for i := 0; i < 10; i++ {}

features.name: loop variable fix
features.description: Loop variables are now per-iteration (no more closure capture bugs)
features.note: Remove workarounds like 'v := v' in closures

features.name: slices package
features.description: Use slices.Sort, slices.Contains, etc. instead of sort.Slice

features.name: maps package
features.note: Manual review - replace manual map operations

features.name: slog package
features.note: Consider migrating from log to slog

features.name: min/max builtins
features.description: Use builtin min()/max() instead of math.Min/math.Max

features.name: clear builtin
features.description: Use clear(m) to clear maps, clear(s) to zero slices
